title: Copper Leaf Sheets - 100 Real Copper Foil Leaves 14x14 cm Metallic Rose Gold Leaf for Craft DIY Proejcts, Paintings, Gilding, Furniture, Makeup & Nail Art
features: High quality material: Carefully crafted with genuine copper, our sheets gives a luxurious rose gold colour which is notably bright and consistent throughout

Multi-use: There is no end to its applications; home decor, nail art, resin jewellery making, glossy decoupage, slime painting, home decor, gilding furniture, statues, buildings and many other artistic endeavours
Tidy Packaging: All 100 sheets of copper leaf are separated by thin white tissue to protect them from damage and wrinkles. Our resealable packing makes it really easy to save and reuse

Easy to use: Our copper sheets are super easy to use! Remove each sheet individually by gently pulling it diagonally and apply it on the desired surface. Use glue or gild it on to make it stick properly
Caution: Our metallic foil leaves are not edible and cannot be used to decorate eatables; cakes, cookies, drinks etc
description: Product Description KraftiSky Gold Leaf Sheet - Flawless like real GOLD! Doesn’t gold make everything look so majestic? With our 100 pieces of gold leaf sheets (14 cm X14 cm), you can add a royal touch to so many different things. Use our gold leaf sheets for art projects, manicures or furniture decoration and watch them being totally transformed! Simply use a little amount of glue or use the gilding technique to stick them on your nails, decorative statues, construction paper etc. INFINITE CREATIVE POSSIBILITIES Our sheets work well with most surfaces, including paper, wood, steel, metal, marble, glass etc. Especially designed to be extremely flexible, they can also be used as gold flakes when decorating for a party. Each sheet is separated with a thin sheet of tissue paper, which protects it from getting stuck together. Let Your Craft Speak, GOLD!! With our gold leaf, a little goes a long way so the 100 sheets will last you a long time! So, whether you use them as whole sheets or gold leaf flakes, they will instantly enhance your decorations. So, start experimenting and enjoy the results of your creativity!
